documentation.text:
@notice User cancels their own booking.
  - > 24 hours before start → 100% refund
  - ≤ 24 hours before start → 50% refund (remainder kept by contract)
  - After slot start → no cancellation allowed
@notice Compute the required ETH for a booking (helper for frontend).
@notice Check if a slot is available for an asset.
@notice Returns contract's accumulated ETH (penalty amounts from 50% refunds).

documentation.text: @dev Reverts if [startTime, endTime) overlaps any active booking for assetId.

devdoc.details: Deploy on Ganache (chainId 1337). Admin is msg.sender at deployment.

params.endTime: Unix timestamp for slot end (must be after startTime) msg.value must equal (endTime - startTime) / 3600 * hourlyFeeWei (integer hours only, minimum 1 hour). Reverts on overlap with any existing active booking. Excess ETH is NOT accepted — must send exact amount.

devdoc.title: CampusAssetBooking

bookAsset(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Book an asset for a time slot.

computeFee(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Compute the required ETH for a booking (helper for frontend).

contractBalance().notice: Returns contract's accumulated ETH (penalty amounts from 50% refunds).

isSlotAvailable(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Check if a slot is available for an asset.

registerUser(address).notice: Register a wallet so it can book assets.

updateAsset(uint256,string,string,string.notice: Update asset metadata and/or fee (does not affect existing bookings).

userCancelBooking(uint256).notice: User cancels their own booking.  - > 24 hours before start → 100% refund  - ≤ 24 hours before start → 50% refund (remainder kept by contract)  - After slot start → no cancellation allowed

userdoc.notice: Decentralized campus resource booking with access control,         conflict detection, and tiered refund policy.
